page_title: HDM Creation Evangelion New Theatrical Edition II
text:
is a line of candy toys produced by Shokugan that was released in early February 2010. https://www.bandai.co.jp/candy/products/2010/588593.html The line was based on the Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance film. There are 5 regular and 4 secret figures (Metalic colors) in the line.
